Interface AttackStrategy

All Superinterfaces:
Describable
All Known Implementing Classes:
CloseAttack, CloseFireAttack, DebuffAttack, LineAttack, LobbedAttack, LobbedFireAttack, PointBlankAttack, PushAttack, PushRadialAttack, RadialAttack, SwarmAttack
public interface AttackStrategy extends Describable
Defines the combat and targeting behavior for a unit on the game board. Implementing classes dictate how a unit identifies targets, calculates the area of impact, and executes damage or status effects during an attack action.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    gm
    A globally accessible, static reference to the GameManager singleton.

    Modifier and Type

    Description
    void
    applyEffects(Tile attacker, Tile target)
    Executes the combat logic, including damage calculation, defense mitigation, and applying any specialized passive triggers or status effects to the target.

    Methods inherited from interface logic.common.Describable

    getDescription, getName

  • Field Details

    • gm

      static final GameManager gm
      A globally accessible, static reference to the GameManager singleton. Provided as a convenience so attack strategies can easily read board state, manage turn phases, or log combat results to the console.

  • Method Details

    • getAttackableTiles

      List<List<Tile>> getAttackableTiles(Tile attacker)
      Calculates the potential tiles that this unit can target for an attack. The nested list structure allows for grouping tiles (e.g., by range rings or specific directions).
      Parameters:
      attacker - The tile currently occupied by the unit performing the attack.
      Returns:
      A nested List of Tiles within the unit's reach.

    • getImpactTiles

      List<List<Tile>> getImpactTiles(Tile attacker)
      Calculates the actual tiles that will be affected once a target tile is selected. This defines the "Area of Effect" (AoE). For single-target attacks, this usually returns only the target tile itself.
      Parameters:
      attacker - The tile occupied by the attacker.
      Returns:
      A nested List of Tiles representing the footprint of the attack's impact.

    • applyEffects

      void applyEffects(Tile attacker, Tile target)
      Executes the combat logic, including damage calculation, defense mitigation, and applying any specialized passive triggers or status effects to the target.
      Parameters:
      attacker - The tile occupied by the unit initiating the strike.
      target - The tile selected as the primary point of impact.

    • playSound

      void playSound(String unitID, double volume)
      Triggers the specific audio feedback associated with this attack type.
      Parameters:
      unitID - The identifier of the unit to determine the specific sound clip.
      volume - The decibel level/gain for the audio playback.
